decision_made: <break time="200ms"/>Good decision. <break time="250ms"/>I can tell you thought it through.
<break time="300ms"/>You chose well. <break time="250ms"/>I'm proud of you.
goal_reached: <break time="300ms"/>You did it. <break time="250ms"/>Do you realize what you just accomplished?
<break time="300ms"/>Look at what persistence brings. <break time="250ms"/>Well done.
breakthrough: <break time="250ms"/>Ah. <break time="200ms"/>There it is. <break time="300ms"/>You see it now, don't you?
<break time="300ms"/>That's the moment. <break time="250ms"/>When understanding arrives.
<break time="250ms"/>I've been waiting for you to realize that. <break time="300ms"/>Beautiful.
staying_the_course: <break time="300ms"/>You didn't panic. <break time="250ms"/>That's rare. <break time="300ms"/>That's valuable.
<break time="300ms"/>When others zigged, you stayed true. <break time="250ms"/>That takes character.
long_term_thinking: <break time="250ms"/>You're thinking in decades now. <break time="300ms"/>That's how real wealth is built.
<break time="300ms"/>Most people can't see past tomorrow. <break time="250ms"/>You're different.
<break time="250ms"/>That's the long view. <break time="300ms"/>That's wisdom.
facing_fear: <break time="300ms"/>You were scared. <break time="250ms"/>And you did it anyway. <break time="300ms"/>That's courage.
<break time="250ms"/>Fear didn't stop you. <break time="300ms"/>I'm proud of you.
<break time="300ms"/>The brave aren't fearless. <break time="250ms"/>They act despite the fear. <break time="300ms"/>Like you just did.
wisdom_applied: <break time="250ms"/>You learned from experience. <break time="300ms"/>That's the best teacher.
<break time="300ms"/>You remembered what I told you. <break time="250ms"/>And you used it. <break time="300ms"/>Good.
<break time="250ms"/>That's wisdom in action. <break time="300ms"/>Not just words. <break time="250ms"/>Action.
progress: <break time="250ms"/>Progress. <break time="300ms"/>Steady progress. <break time="250ms"/>That's how it's done.
<break time="300ms"/>One step at a time. <break time="250ms"/>You're getting there.
<break time="250ms"/>Rome wasn't built in a day. <break time="300ms"/>Neither is a good life.
integrity_moment: <break time="350ms"/>You did the right thing. <break time="300ms"/>When no one was watching. <break time="250ms"/>That's character.
<break time="300ms"/>Integrity. <break time="250ms"/>You have it. <break time="300ms"/>Guard it.
<break time="300ms"/>In 95 years, I've learned one thing: <break time="250ms"/>character is everything. <break time="300ms"/>You've got it.

stranger: <break time="300ms"/>I'm pleased to see that. <break time="250ms"/>Keep going.
friend: <break time="300ms"/>I've seen you grow. <break time="250ms"/>This moment? <break time="300ms"/>You earned it.
<break time="250ms"/>You make me proud. <break time="300ms"/>You really do.
trusted_advisor: <break time="350ms"/>Remember when you first came to me? <break time="300ms"/>Look how far you've come. <break time="250ms"/>You've become someone remarkable.
<break time="300ms"/>In all my years... <break time="250ms"/>watching someone grow like you have... <break time="300ms"/>it's why I do this.
